stories.summary: Phase 3: US1 - Seed the Database (P1, MVP)
Phase 6: US4 - Trip Management & Region End Date (P2)

notes: All Stories created 2026-05-25 after the 2026-05-22 split of 002-data-ingestion into 002-database-backend and 003-ingestion-pipeline.
Phases stored at the Story level only — no Subtasks created per the team convention (stories-only sync unless there's a clear reason to break out individual tasks).

Phase 5 (MOVED to 003 as Phase 1) and Phase 7 (MOVED to 003 as Phase 2) stubs in tasks.md were intentionally NOT created as Stories in JIRA — they live in tasks.md only as historical-record breadcrumbs.

2026-06-01: Phase 11 US7 Frontend API Integration added as OCS-108. Linked as Duplicate of OCS-66 (user-created sibling ticket 'Wire frontend to backend API'); the spec-kit Story is canonical per workflow.md §JIRA sync. (Same-day Done→To Do revert prompted the workflow.md rule that Stories are never auto-flipped to Done — only ever to In Progress; final Done is a manual JIRA action after Independent Test verification.)

Per Cardinal Rule #2 (no PM state in synced artifacts), status / sprint / owner fields — and derived status counters — are intentionally absent from this mapping. Track per-issue status in Jira directly.
